name: eurosys-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for EuroSys submissions: venue fit, the dual spring/fall deadline calendar, HotCRP submission checks, rebuttal and one-shot revision strategy, ACM camera-ready, sysartifacts artifact evaluation with badges, reproducibility, writing style, related work, experiments, and workflow. Grounded in the EuroSys 2027 CFP, HotCRP sites, sysartifacts pages, and eurosys.org, checked on 2026-07-08.
